td.style: border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:top; padding:3px 2px; font-size:10px; line-height:1.4; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:top; padding:3px 2px; font-size:10px; line-height:1.4; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:top; padding:3px 2px; font-size:10px; line-height:1.4; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:top; padding:3px 2px; font-size:10px; line-height:1.4; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:top; padding:3px 2px; font-size:10px; line-height:1.4; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

div.style: width:100%; background:transparent; padding:0; margin:0; border:none; height:42px; overflow:visible; position:relative;

position:absolute; top:4px; right:8px; width:32px; height:32px; border-radius:50%; border:1.8px solid #8a4531; background:#fff8ef; color:#5a2f22; text-align:center; line-height:32px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800;
width:100%; background:#fff; border-top:none !important; box-shadow:none !important; padding:4px 8px; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact; print-color-adjust:exact;

border:3px double #8a4531; border-radius:14px; padding:0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fffdf9 0%, #fff5ea 50%, #fff9f2 100%); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #d4af37, inset 0 0 30px rgba(212,175,55,0.05);
width:64px; height:64px; border:2px solid #d4af37; border-radius:50%; padding:3px; background: radial-gradient(circle, #fff8ed 0%, #fff 70%); display:inline-block;
font-size:11px; color:#8a4531; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:2px;
font-size:26px; font-weight:900; color:#3d1810; line-height:1.1; letter-spacing:0.5px; text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(212,175,55,0.2);
font-size:14px; font-weight:800; color:#8a4531; line-height:1.15; margin-top:2px; letter-spacing:0.3px;
font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:#6f3a29; margin-top:3px; font-style: italic;

td.div: धारा 23 अवार्ड सारांश एवं परियोजना विश्लेषण

div.style: display:inline-block; margin-top:6px; padding:2px 14px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, #d4af37 30%, #f4d564 50%, #d4af37 70%, transparent 100%); border-radius:2px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8a4531 0%, #5a2d20 100%); color:#fff8ed; padding:8px 10px; border-radius:8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(138,69,49,0.3);

background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #fdf6ed 100%); border:1px solid #c9926d; border-left:5px solid #8a4531; border-radius:8px; padding:10px 12px; margin-bottom:10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(138,69,49,0.08);

span.style: font-size:9px; color:#a06548; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.6px; display:block;
font-size:9px; color:#a06548; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.6px; display:block;
font-size:9px; color:#a06548; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.6px; display:block;
font-size:9px; color:#a06548; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.6px; display:block;
display:inline-block; background:#8a4531; color:#fff; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:10px; font-weight:800; font-size:10px; margin-right:6px;
display:inline-block; background:#1565c0; color:#fff; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:10px; font-weight:800; font-size:10px; margin-right:4px;

span.t-esc: o.village_id.tehsil_id.name if o.village_id and o.village_id.tehsil_id else '-'
o.village_id.district_id.name if o.village_id and o.village_id.district_id else '-'

td.style: width:17%; border:none !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f3f9f4 100%); border-top:3px solid #2e7d32 !important; border-radius:8px; text-align:center; padding:9px 5px; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(46,125,50,0.12);

div.style: width:28px; height:28px; line-height:28px; border-radius:50%; background:#2e7d32; color:#fff; font-size:14px; font-weight:900; margin: 0 auto 4px auto;

td.style: width:18%; border:none !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #fff9e6 100%); border-top:3px solid #f57c00 !important; border-radius:8px; text-align:center; padding:9px 5px; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(245,124,0,0.12);

div.style: width:28px; height:28px; line-height:28px; border-radius:50%; background:#f57c00; color:#fff; font-size:14px; font-weight:900; margin: 0 auto 4px auto;

td.style: width:18%; border:none !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f1f8e9 100%); border-top:3px solid #689f38 !important; border-radius:8px; text-align:center; padding:9px 5px; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(104,159,56,0.12);

div.style: width:28px; height:28px; line-height:28px; border-radius:50%; background:#689f38; color:#fff; font-size:14px; font-weight:900; margin: 0 auto 4px auto;

td.style: width:18%; border:none !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f3e5f5 100%); border-top:3px solid #6a1b9a !important; border-radius:8px; text-align:center; padding:9px 5px; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(106,27,154,0.12);

div.style: width:28px; height:28px; line-height:28px; border-radius:50%; background:#6a1b9a; color:#fff; font-size:14px; font-weight:900; margin: 0 auto 4px auto;

td.style: width:3%; border:none !important; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; font-size:32px; color:#8a4531; font-weight:900;

width:26%; border:none !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff9e6 0%, #ffe066 30%, #fff8d6 70%, #ffe066 100%); border:2px solid #d4af37 !important; border-radius:10px; text-align:center; padding:9px 6px; box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(212,175,55,0.4), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.8);

div.style: font-size:24px; color:#3d1810; font-weight:900; margin-top:3px; line-height:1; text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.5);

td.style: width:50%; vertical-align:top; border:none !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #fafdf6 100%); border:1px solid #c5d6a8 !important; border-radius:8px; padding:0; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(46,125,50,0.08);

div.style: background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2e7d32 0%, #4caf50 100%); color:#fff; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:7px 7px 0 0; font-size:11.5px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.5px;

td.div: 💧 Irrigation Mix & Land Insights / सिंचाई वर्गीकरण

td.style: border:1px solid #c5d6a8 !important; padding:5px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:800; color:#2e7d32;
border:1px solid #ffe0a3 !important; padding:5px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:800; color:#ef6c00;
border:1px solid #d6d6d6 !important; padding:5px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:800; color:#424242;

div.style: margin-top:8px; font-size:9.5px; color:#558b2f; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;
height:11px; background:#f5f5f5; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden;

div.t-att-style: 'height:11px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2e7d32 0%, #4caf50 100%); width:' + str(((cover_irrigated_area * 100.0 / cover_land_area_total) if cover_land_area_total else 0.0)) + '%;'

div.style: height:11px; background:#f5f5f5; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden; margin-top:3px;

div.t-att-style: 'height:11px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ef6c00 0%, #ffa726 100%); width:' + str(((cover_unirrigated_area * 100.0 / cover_land_area_total) if cover_land_area_total else 0.0)) + '%;'

div.style: height:11px; background:#f5f5f5; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden; margin-top:3px;

div.t-att-style: 'height:11px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #616161 0%, #9e9e9e 100%); width:' + str(((cover_fallow_area * 100.0 / cover_land_area_total) if cover_land_area_total else 0.0)) + '%;'

td.style: width:50%; vertical-align:top; border:none !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #faf5ee 100%); border:1px solid #c9926d !important; border-radius:8px; padding:0; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(138,69,49,0.08);

div.style: background: linear-gradient(90deg, #5d4037 0%, #8d6e63 100%); color:#fff; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:7px 7px 0 0; font-size:11.5px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.5px;

td.style: border:1px solid #c9926d !important; padding:5px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:800; color:#5d4037;
border:1px solid #d4b39a !important; padding:5px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:800; color:#8d6e63;
border:2px solid #d4af37 !important; padding:6px; text-align:center; font-weight:900; color:#5a2d20;
border:2px solid #d4af37 !important; padding:6px; text-align:right; font-weight:900; color:#5a2d20;
border:2px solid #d4af37 !important; padding:6px; text-align:right; font-weight:900; color:#5a2d20;

div.style: margin-top:8px; font-size:9.5px; color:#6d4c41; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;
height:11px; background:#f5f5f5; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden; margin-top:4px;

div.t-att-style: 'height:11px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4e342e 0%, #795548 100%); width:' + str(((cover_mr_area * 100.0 / cover_land_area_total) if cover_land_area_total else 0.0)) + '%;'

div.style: height:11px; background:#f5f5f5; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden; margin-top:3px;

div.t-att-style: 'height:11px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #a1887f 0%, #d7ccc8 100%); width:' + str(((cover_bmr_area * 100.0 / cover_land_area_total) if cover_land_area_total else 0.0)) + '%;'

td.style: width:50%; vertical-align:top; border:none !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f1f8e9 100%); border:1px solid #aed581 !important; border-radius:8px; padding:0; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(104,159,56,0.08);

div.style: background: linear-gradient(90deg, #558b2f 0%, #8bc34a 100%); color:#fff; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:7px 7px 0 0; font-size:11.5px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.5px;

td.style: border:1px solid #ffe082 !important; padding:5px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:800; color:#e65100;
border:1px solid #c5e1a5 !important; padding:5px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:800; color:#2e7d32;
border:2px solid #d4af37 !important; padding:6px; text-align:center; font-weight:900; color:#5a2d20;
border:2px solid #d4af37 !important; padding:6px; text-align:right; font-weight:900; color:#5a2d20;
border:2px solid #d4af37 !important; padding:6px; text-align:right; font-weight:900; color:#5a2d20;

width:50%; vertical-align:top; border:none !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f3e5f5 100%); border:1px solid #ce93d8 !important; border-radius:8px; padding:0; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(106,27,154,0.08);

div.style: background: linear-gradient(90deg, #6a1b9a 0%, #ab47bc 100%); color:#fff; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:7px 7px 0 0; font-size:11.5px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.5px;

td.style: border:1px solid #f48fb1 !important; padding:4px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:800; color:#c2185b;
border:1px solid #90caf9 !important; padding:4px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:800; color:#1565c0;
border:1px solid #ffcc80 !important; padding:4px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:800; color:#ef6c00;
border:1px solid #ce93d8 !important; padding:4px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:800; color:#6a1b9a;
border:2px solid #d4af37 !important; padding:5px 6px; text-align:center; font-weight:900; color:#5a2d20;
border:2px solid #d4af37 !important; padding:5px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:900; color:#5a2d20;
border:2px solid #d4af37 !important; padding:5px 6px; text-align:right; font-weight:900; color:#5a2d20;

div.style: margin-top:8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff8ed 0%, #fff5e6 100%); border:1px solid #d4b39a; border-left:4px solid #8a4531; border-radius:6px; padding:8px 12px;
width:32px; height:32px; line-height:32px; border-radius:50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8a4531 0%, #b85c43 100%); color:#fff; text-align:center; font-size:16px; font-weight:900;

td.div: Executive Summary Statement / कार्यकारी सारांश विवरण

This document presents component-wise compensation analytics, irrigation distribution, road-band analysis, and asset categorization for village-level award decision support and audit compliance.
यह दस्तावेज़ ग्राम-स्तरीय अवार्ड निर्णय समर्थन एवं लेखा-परीक्षा अनुपालन के लिए घटक-वार मुआवजा विश्लेषण प्रदान करता है।

t.t-value: o.avg_three_year_sales_sort_rate if o._name == 'bhu.section23.award' else 0.0
o.env.context.get('s23_pdf_scope', 'all')
s23_scope in ('all', 'land')
s23_scope in ('all', 'tree')
s23_scope in ('all', 'asset')
bool(o.env.context.get('s23_include_cover', False))
len([g for g in land_groups if g.get('landowner_name')])
(o.currency_id and o.currency_id.symbol) or '₹'
land_data or []
[r for r in cover_land_rows if r.get('irrigated')]
[r for r in cover_land_rows if r.get('unirrigated')]
[r for r in cover_land_rows if not r.get('irrigated') and not r.get('unirrigated')]
[r for r in cover_land_rows if r.get('is_within_distance')]
[r for r in cover_land_rows if not r.get('is_within_distance')]
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_land_rows])
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_irrigated_rows])
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_unirrigated_rows])
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_fallow_rows])
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_mr_rows])
sum([(r.get('acquired_area') or 0.0) for r in cover_bmr_rows])
tree_data or []
[r for r in cover_tree_rows if (r.get('tree_type_code') or '') == 'fruit_bearing']
[r for r in cover_tree_rows if (r.get('tree_type_code') or '') != 'fruit_bearing']
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_tree_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_tree_fruit_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_tree_non_fruit_rows])
asset_data or []
[r for r in cover_asset_rows if str(r.get('asset_code', '4')) == '1']
[r for r in cover_asset_rows if str(r.get('asset_code', '4')) == '2']
[r for r in cover_asset_rows if str(r.get('asset_code', '4')) == '3']
[r for r in cover_asset_rows if str(r.get('asset_code', '4')) not in ('1','2','3')]
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_asset_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_asset_house_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_asset_well_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_asset_shed_rows])
sum([(r.get('total') or 0.0) for r in cover_asset_other_rows])

th.style: border:none !important; box-shadow:none !important; background:#fff !important; padding:0 0 4px 0 !important;

div.style: display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px; color:#000; font-family:'Noto Sans Devanagari','Mangal','Arial Unicode MS','DejaVu Sans',sans-serif;

div.div: भू-अर्जन प्रकरण क्रमांक ग्राम- () Project तहसील- जिला-
विगत 3 वर्षों का औसत बिक्री छांट दर रुपए में (प्रति हेक्टेयर) :

th.style: border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
width: 120px; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900; white-space: pre-line;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
width: 9%; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;

td.style: text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; white-space: pre-line; vertical-align: top;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important;
text-align: center; border: 1px solid #000 !important; font-weight:700; vertical-align:middle;
text-align: center; border: 1px solid #000 !important; font-weight:700; vertical-align:middle;

t.t-value: group.get('basic_value', 0.0) or 0.0
group.get('market_value', 0.0) or 0.0
group.get('solatium', 0.0) or 0.0
group_market_total + group_solatium_total + group_interest_total

td.style: text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;
text-align: right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #ffd54f;

t.t-value: serial + 1

tr.td: No land data available / भूमि डेटा उपलब्ध नहीं है (Blank)

th.style: border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #f5f5f5 !important; color:#000 !important; font-weight:700;
width: 28px; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900; white-space: pre-line;
width: 130px; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900; white-space: pre-line;
text-align: center; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900;

tr.th: भूमि जिस पर वृक्ष लगे हैं, का विवरण तथा मुआवजा

th.style: width: 60px; border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900; white-space: pre-line;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900; white-space: pre-line;
border: 1px solid #000 !important; background-color: #d3d3d3; color: #000; font-weight: 900; white-space: pre-line;
